title: cayratia neurosa
intro: Cayratia neurosa, also known as the 'Kamranga' or 'Wild Grape', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Vitaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cayratia neurosa include its ability to treat digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Cayratia neurosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, as well as being consumed raw or as a juice.
